name: Dragon Bloom
description: Spike 1 — Milkdrop-uplift feedback bloom. Live waveform drawn as a polar curve (nWaveMode=7 analog) and accumulated through mv_warp decay + per-vertex feather displacement, producing a warm fiery feathered bloom that breathes with the bass and streams with the mids. No symmetry / no palette polish yet (Spike 2/3). Faithful uplift target: `$$$ Royal - Mashup (220)`. See docs/presets/DRAGON_BLOOM_PLAN.md.
author: Matt
